response.justification: Exceptional technical depth and learning agility across multiple domains, but critical gaps for this leadership role. German proficiency is listed as "Basic" versus the required C1 level for a German-based consulting firm. Additionally, experience lacks explicit IT architecture design, UML modeling, requirements management, and client-facing consulting leadership—recent roles show individual contributor-focused work (full-stack engineer, pricing development) rather than the team leadership and architectural advisory expected for a Head of Development position.
strengths: Extensive cross-domain technical expertise spanning 15+ years (web, mobile, desktop, embedded systems) with demonstrated ability to rapidly master new languages and frameworks
Open-source leadership and community engagement through GISCollective platform founding and technical teaching (workshops, code dojos, conference talks demonstrating knowledge sharing)
Modern software development mastery including TDD, CI/CD, microservices, AWS CDK, Docker infrastructure, and proven understanding of low-latency, high-scale systems
concerns: German language proficiency listed as "Basic" falls critically short of required C1 minimum for German-based consulting leadership role
No explicit evidence of IT architecture design, UML modeling, formal requirements management, or security/compliance expertise despite senior titles
Recent career trajectory emphasizes individual contributor roles (full-stack engineer, pricing team developer) rather than team leadership, project management, or client-facing advisory positions

key_factors.factor: IT Architecture and Client Consulting Experience
